name: Baluchimon

signature_move.name: Psychic Chain
signature_move.description: Constricts the enemy with psychokinetic chains, and drives them away.

description: A Holy Beast Digimon confirmed to exist in herds in ruins unearthed from beneath Folder Continent . It turns outs that the ruins were once used as a fortress for Angel-species Digimon, and it is presumed that the Baluchimon were the ones that protected the fortress. Although it has a calm and quiet personality, it also has a ferocious side that mercilessly attacks the enemy. It is highly intelligent, and once it immediately discerns the hostility of an intruder, it constricts their body with psychokinetic chains ( Psychic Chain ), and drives them away. It is said that it displays illusions to those who get lost in the ruins unknowingly with the clouds that it spews out ( Cloud Vision ), and leads them out of the ruins while they are in a dream-like state.
